text: - 1.4.1 Subcontractor shall hold weekly Safety Meetings with all of its on-site Workers (employees, subcontractors, etc). A copy of the Subcontractor's Weekly Safety Meeting minutes with a list of signatures of all attendees shall be supplied to the Contractor's Field Superintendent on a weekly basis. The purpose of this meeting is for the Subcontractor to provide Safety Awareness, Safety Compliance Guidelines and Safety Education to all of its Workers on the jobsite and to provide specific job-related information conveyed to Subcontractor's representative at the Contractor's Weekly Safety Meeting. In the event of a 'language' barrier, Subcontractor shall be responsible to translate and convey all Safety and job specific information to all of its workers.
